content:
About this site # A long time ago, I wanted to find a place to write down my thoughts. First, it is convenient for me to look back and sigh at how I’ve grown. Second, my memory is not very good — after a while, I can’t remember how I dealt with a problem. Write it down, which is convenient for memory and reference. Third, some things are wrong paths I’ve taken — if writing them down can help others with the same problem, that’s a good thing.
In my opinion, making something exist in the world that didn’t exist before is called creation. Creation can be big or small. Taking a photo is creation, writing a paragraph is creation, making a video is creation, and finding a novel way to describe something is also creation. I hope this space becomes a place that wraps up my “creations”.
About me # TODO
summary: About this site # A long time ago, I wanted to find a place to write down my thoughts. First, it is convenient for me to look back and sigh at how I’ve grown. Third, some things are wrong paths I’ve taken — if writing them down can help others with the same problem, that’s a good thing.
title: About

content:
天阴阴的，白鞋显得更加白了。草地虽然乱糟糟的，但因为表面是潮湿的，所以也挺有质感的。
前两天看到一博主拍的这种风格的照片，觉得挺有趣的。今天拍照时突然想起来了。于是也试试。
看多了会有点头晕……
按下快门的同时调整变焦环。
这张旋转的还算比较完美。
仿佛是从一个树洞往外看。
绿色的草地，潮湿的马路，以及它们之间的泾渭分明。
很特别的一棵树。虽然是夏天，但它的叶子都变黄落下去了。这混乱的四季。
不像真实的银杏叶子。
summary: 天阴阴的，白鞋显得更加白了。草地虽然乱糟糟的，但因为表面是潮湿的，所以也挺有质感的。
